description_long: This is a D-Link wireless router featuring a sleek, rectangular black body with a textured surface and four prominent, upward-angled external antennas for enhanced signal coverage. The top surface displays the D-Link logo and a set of indicator lights for power, internet, and network status. The rear panel is equipped with multiple ports, including Ethernet and WAN connections, as well as a power input, all arranged in a single row for easy access. The device is constructed primarily from durable plastic, with visible ventilation grilles to prevent overheating. The overall design is compact and modern, suitable for placement on desks, shelves, or other flat surfaces in urban environments. The router's form factor and external antennas make it easily recognizable as a high-performance networking device.
description: A black D-Link wireless router with four external antennas, indicator lights, and rear-facing ports, designed for modern connectivity and signal coverage.
description_view_0: Side view showing two antennas on each side and the D-Link logo on the top surface.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the four antennas and the row of ports, including Ethernet and power input.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the antenna arrangement and the textured top surface.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the indicator lights and the smooth, slightly curved front edge.
attribute_port_arrangement: 4 Ethernet ports in a row, 1 WAN port on the left, 1 power input on the right
